condition_cn: 条件：90分钟常规时间打平；输入包括完整90分钟预测、平局比分分布、淘汰赛证据、常规时间Tail与MAS结论。

points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段时间短且淘汰赛风险偏好下降，仍平是基础高概率分支。
points.rationale_en: Extra time is short and knockout risk appetite falls, so remaining level is the baseline high-probability branch.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
points.rationale_cn: A队凭借体能、替补或压迫优势在加时净胜一球。
points.rationale_en: Team A wins extra time by one goal through fitness, bench impact or pressing advantages.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
points.rationale_cn: B队凭借体能、替补或反击效率在加时净胜一球。
points.rationale_en: Team B wins extra time by one goal through fitness, bench impact or counterattacking efficiency.

points.tail_title_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
points.rationale_cn: A队在对手体能或心理崩盘后拉开比分。
points.rationale_en: Team A pulls away after the opponent suffers a fitness or psychological collapse.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段比赛打开，双方各有一次有效转化。
points.tail_title_en: Open extra time / both teams score
points.rationale_en: Extra time opens up and both sides convert one effective chance.

points.tail_title_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.rationale_en: A low-frequency tail path where fatigue or open extra-time play creates a wider scoring swing.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球，体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
points.rationale_cn: A队加时领先后仍被对手回应，但最终净胜。
points.tail_title_en: Open extra time / both teams score, Fatigue collapse / extra-time breakthrough
points.rationale_en: Team A takes the lead in extra time, is answered by the opponent, but still wins the period.

points.tail_title_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
points.rationale_cn: 加时一球分胜负的补充覆盖路径。
points.rationale_en: A supplemental one-goal extra-time decision path.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.tail_title_en: Open extra time / both teams score
points.rationale_en: A low-frequency tail path where fatigue or open extra-time play creates a wider scoring swing.

points.rationale_cn: 由统一淘汰赛路径分布派生。
points.rationale_en: Derived from the unified knockout-path distribution.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.tail_title_en: Open extra time / both teams score
points.rationale_en: A low-frequency tail path where fatigue or open extra-time play creates a wider scoring swing.

points.rationale_cn: 由统一淘汰赛路径分布派生。
points.rationale_en: Derived from the unified knockout-path distribution.

points.rationale_cn: 由统一淘汰赛路径分布派生。
points.rationale_en: Derived from the unified knockout-path distribution.

points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.rationale_en: A low-frequency tail path where fatigue or open extra-time play creates a wider scoring swing.

points.rationale_cn: 双方加时互有进球但仍未分胜负的补充覆盖路径。
points.rationale_en: A supplementary extra-time path where both teams score but the match remains level.

tail_focus.label: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
tail_focus.label_cn: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时30分钟内通过反击、定位球或替补冲击形成1球胜负。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: A队凭借体能、替补或压迫优势在加时净胜一球。
tail_focus.definition_en: A one-goal extra-time result created by counters, set pieces or substitute impact within the 30-minute period.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Team A wins extra time by one goal through fitness, bench impact or pressing advantages.

tail_focus.label: 加时开放 / 双方进球
tail_focus.label_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时阶段双方均有进球，比赛从谨慎拖入开放对攻。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: 加时阶段比赛打开，双方各有一次有效转化。
tail_focus.label_en: Open extra time / both teams score
tail_focus.definition_en: Both sides score in extra time as the match shifts from caution into open exchanges.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Extra time opens up and both sides convert one effective chance.

tail_focus.label: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
tail_focus.label_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时净胜至少2球，或总进球达到3球以上的一方打穿路径。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: A队在对手体能或心理崩盘后拉开比分。
tail_focus.definition_en: An extra-time blow-through path where one side wins by at least two goals, or the extra-time total reaches three or more goals.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Team A pulls away after the opponent suffers a fitness or psychological collapse.

key_factors.impact_cn: 完整90分钟分布显示法国常规时间胜率68.71%，平局19.67%，瑞典胜11.63%
key_factors.impact_en: The full 90-minute distribution shows France winning in regulation 68.71% of the time, a draw 19.67%, and Sweden winning 11.63%.
key_factors.text_cn: 完整90分钟分布显示法国常规时间胜率68.71%，平局19.67%，瑞典胜11.63%
key_factors.text_en: The full 90-minute distribution shows France winning in regulation 68.71% of the time, a draw 19.67%, and Sweden winning 11.63%.

key_factors.impact_cn: 这会决定加时是低位消耗战还是开放对攻
key_factors.impact_en: This will determine whether extra time becomes a low-block attrition phase or an open exchange.
key_factors.text_cn: 这会决定加时是低位消耗战还是开放对攻
key_factors.text_en: This will determine whether extra time becomes a low-block attrition phase or an open exchange.

key_factors.impact_cn: 但瑞典把比赛拖长的可检验路径清晰，主要依靠低位防守后的定位球、高球二点、疲劳导致的犯规与VAR纪律风险
key_factors.impact_en: Sweden’s verifiable route to extending the match is clear: set pieces after low-block defending, second balls from aerial play, fatigue-driven fouls and VAR/discipline risk.
key_factors.text_cn: 但瑞典把比赛拖长的可检验路径清晰，主要依靠低位防守后的定位球、高球二点、疲劳导致的犯规与VAR纪律风险
key_factors.text_en: Sweden’s verifiable route to extending the match is clear: set pieces after low-block defending, second balls from aerial play, fatigue-driven fouls and VAR/discipline risk.

key_factors.impact_cn: 若进入加时，法国仍因整体实力、边路个人能力、替补攻击深度和瑞典中卫Isak Hien缺阵获得轻微到中等优势
key_factors.impact_en: If the match reaches extra time, France still holds a slight-to-moderate edge through overall quality, individual wide-player ability, attacking bench depth and Sweden center-back Isak Hien’s absence.
key_factors.text_cn: 若进入加时，法国仍因整体实力、边路个人能力、替补攻击深度和瑞典中卫Isak Hien缺阵获得轻微到中等优势
key_factors.text_en: If the match reaches extra time, France still holds a slight-to-moderate edge through overall quality, individual wide-player ability, attacking bench depth and Sweden center-back Isak Hien’s absence.

key_factors.impact_cn: 若105分钟后仍平，点球预期会明显改变风险偏好：法国点球端只可给轻微倾向，不能强判
key_factors.impact_en: If it is still level after 105 minutes, penalty expectations will clearly change risk appetite: France can only be given a slight penalty-side lean, not a strong call.
key_factors.text_cn: 若105分钟后仍平，点球预期会明显改变风险偏好：法国点球端只可给轻微倾向，不能强判
key_factors.text_en: If it is still level after 105 minutes, penalty expectations will clearly change risk appetite: France can only be given a slight penalty-side lean, not a strong call.

condition_en: Condition: the match is level after 90 minutes; inputs include the full 90-minute prediction, draw score distribution, knockout evidence, normal-time tail scenarios and MAS conclusions.
